lines.text: The night train left the coast at nineteen minutes past midnight, carrying rain on every window and silence in every seat.

versions.text: The night train left the coast at nineteen minutes past midnight, carrying rain on every window and silence in every seat.
pacing_notes: Pacing sits in the expected range.

lines.text: Across from me, a woman in a dark blue coat kept one gloved hand on a tin box no larger than a prayer book.

versions.text: Across from me, a woman in a dark blue coat kept one gloved hand on a tin box no larger than a prayer book.
pacing_notes: Pacing sits in the expected range.

lines.text: You are awake early, she said, though the hour had already crossed into something stranger than early.

versions.text: You are awake early, she said, though the hour had already crossed into something stranger than early.
pacing_notes: Pacing sits in the expected range.

lines.text: I told her sleep had stepped off somewhere before the last station and had not bothered to return.

versions.text: I told her sleep had stepped off somewhere before the last station and had not bothered to return.
pacing_notes: Pacing sits in the expected range.

lines.text: People only travel with that face when they are running toward something, she said, or away from it.

versions.text: People only travel with that face when they are running toward something, she said, or away from it.
pacing_notes: Punctuation suggests stronger pauses than the audio delivered.
Drags compared with the script length.
Very short line is landing long.

lines.text: The conductor lifted his lantern, and for a second the compartment shone gold enough to make the woman look almost unreal.

versions.text: The conductor lifted his lantern, and for a second the compartment shone gold enough to make the woman look almost unreal.
pacing_notes: Pacing sits in the expected range.

lines.text: Do not tell him my name, she whispered.

versions.text: Do not tell him my name, she whispered.
pacing_notes: Pacing sits in the expected range.

lines.text: The train leaned hard into a curve, the box rattled once against the window, and every passenger in the carriage looked up at the same time.

versions.text: The train leaned hard into a curve, the box rattled once against the window, and every passenger in the carriage looked up at the same time.
pacing_notes: Pacing sits in the expected range.

lines.text: That was when I understood the box was not meant to survive the morning.

versions.text: That was when I understood the box was not meant to survive the morning.
